shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Frame size remains 120x180 px for the enemy duel slot.
Casting pose must leave a clear hand-off point for projectile launch at wand x=92 y=58 inside the local frame.
differences: This file carries the enemy warning pose and launch beat instead of a neutral idle cycle.
Cape flare and spell sigil pulse over 6 frames at 8 fps.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground enemy slot scale and fantasy academy lighting.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground the 0.5 second warning beat and enemy HP-side staging.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/character_enemy_duelist_cast_6f_8fps.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under character_enemy_duelist_cast_6f_8fps.
runtime_notes: Create a 6-column TextureAtlasLayout and loop it while the enemy remains in warning or casting state.
Place the sprite at z=4 so projectile sprites can pass in front at z=5.
Keep wand-tip launch coordinates consistent for fire and thunder projectile spawn offsets.

context.usage: Shown during the 0.5 second warning beat and the active projectile launch frame.

shape.silhouette: Rival mage with flared cape, raised wand arm, and a bright launch sigil near the hand.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 720x180 px with 6 frames.
Wand-tip launch point remains within a 3 px radius across all frames.
Launch sigil reaches #FFFACD peak brightness in frame 6 with no outline break.
